problemAnalysis.name: Problem Identification
problemAnalysis.finding: Multiple critical issues: checkout failures, app crashes, order discrepancies

problemAnalysis.name: Root Cause Analysis
problemAnalysis.finding: System integration issues between cart/order systems; app QA gaps

problemAnalysis.name: Impact Assessment
problemAnalysis.finding: All checkout users affected; mobile users disproportionately impacted

problemAnalysis.name: Problem Prioritization
problemAnalysis.finding: Payment reliability > App stability > Order accuracy > CS response

userNeeds.name: User Goals
userNeeds.finding: Product discovery works well; purchase completion unreliable

userNeeds.name: User Expectations
userNeeds.finding: Brand prestige creates high expectations; checkout failures disappoint

userNeeds.name: Pain Point Mitigation
userNeeds.finding: Known issues persist without visible resolution efforts

userNeeds.name: Task Efficiency
userNeeds.finding: Good search/navigation, bad checkout requiring multiple attempts

userNeeds.name: Error Recovery
userNeeds.finding: Payment errors leave users confused; double charges require CS contact

businessNeeds.name: Revenue Protection
businessNeeds.finding: Checkout failures directly lose sales; double charges create refund burden

businessNeeds.name: Brand Consistency
businessNeeds.finding: Visual design excellent; technical quality undermines premium brand

businessNeeds.name: Market Compliance
businessNeeds.finding: Consumer protection compliant; accessibility below EU EAA standard

businessNeeds.name: Competitive Position
businessNeeds.finding: Strong brand but competitors have more reliable checkout

balance.name: User-Business Alignment
balance.finding: Membership upsells balanced; checkout issues favor neither party

balance.name: Quality-Speed Tradeoff
balance.finding: App updates appear rushed with insufficient QA

impact.name: Visible Impact
impact.finding: Error messages, checkout blocks, app crashes visible to users

impact.name: Invisible Impact
impact.finding: Backend order processing issues, inventory sync problems

impact.name: Financial Impact
impact.finding: Lost sales, refund processing, CS costs, brand damage

creativity.name: Experience Differentiation
creativity.finding: If checkout stabilized, brand loyalty + reliability = strong moat

oracleProblems.title: User Convenience vs. Payment Security
oracleProblems.description: User need for fast checkout conflicts with security verification requirements
oracleProblems.evidence: Users report multiple payment attempts AND double charges - both friction AND insufficient verification
oracleProblems.resolution: Implement saved payment methods with modern 3DS2 authentication

oracleProblems.title: Mobile App Feature Velocity vs. Stability
oracleProblems.description: Product team feature pressure conflicts with engineering need for stability testing
oracleProblems.evidence: August 2025 reviews cite crashes, loading failures, something went wrong errors
oracleProblems.resolution: Implement feature flags, establish stability KPIs as release gates

oracleProblems.title: Accessibility Standard Level
oracleProblems.description: Gap between stated WCAG 2.0 A commitment and EU EAA WCAG 2.1 AA requirement
oracleProblems.evidence: Accessibility policy states WCAG 2.0 Level A; EU EAA requires WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA
oracleProblems.resolution: Upgrade commitment to WCAG 2.2 AA, conduct comprehensive audit

oracleProblems.title: Customer Service Channel Strategy
oracleProblems.description: Assumption that refund-focused contact is sufficient; no data on broader needs
oracleProblems.evidence: Users cannot report delivery issues without selecting refund option
oracleProblems.resolution: Conduct user research, add order status and general help options

detectedFailureModes.evidence: Multiple users report inability to complete checkout

detectedFailureModes.description: Cards charged twice, PayPal failures with funds taken
detectedFailureModes.evidence: User reviews cite double charges and ghost transactions

detectedFailureModes.description: Size in cart differs from confirmation email

recommendations.title: Payment Processing Overhaul
actions: Implement idempotency keys to prevent duplicate charges

recommendations.title: Mobile App Stability Program
actions: Establish stability metrics as release gates

recommendations.title: Order Data Synchronization
actions: Generate email from final order state

creativityDomains.description: ML to predict and prevent quality issues
Inform users before they discover issues
Fallback options when primary path fails
Build trust through openness about quality
Leverage user community for quality insights

ecommerceCheckoutQuality.pattern: E-commerce checkout reliability is the primary QX determinant
ecommerceCheckoutQuality.insight: Payment processing failures have cascading impact: lost revenue, support burden, brand damage

mobileAppStability.pattern: Mobile app stability directly correlates with user retention in e-commerce
mobileAppStability.insight: Feature velocity without stability testing causes exponential user loss

brandExpectationGap.pattern: Premium brand perception amplifies disappointment from technical failures
brandExpectationGap.insight: Strong brand creates higher expectations; failures feel worse

accessibilityComplianceGap.pattern: Stated accessibility commitment often below legal requirements
accessibilityComplianceGap.insight: WCAG 2.0 A vs EU EAA WCAG 2.1 AA gap is common and risky

limitations: CDN blocking prevented direct page analysis
Analysis relied on third-party data sources
Some user reviews from 2024-2025; issues may have been addressed
